begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

user_id.text: ผู้ทำรายการ

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , 'X-XX-XXXXXXXX' )as loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first, to_tdate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) as tdate_requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_status, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit, sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_code, --sc_doc_regis.regis_date, --sc_doc_regis.request_amount, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_rule_loanpermit_levelcustom(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,to_date(sysdate) ,'loan_by_salary') as recoverable
,( select nvl(sum(fund_new),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_new where sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as fund_new
,( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) + nvl(sum(fund_int),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 ) as fund_ret
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) + nvl(sum(fund_int),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no = 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_old
,( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) + nvl(sum(fund_int),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_50,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no ,
pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-XXXXXXX') as paid_loan_acc_no,
sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money, (select sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name from sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money) as money_type_name ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) as loan_type_description ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock
,(SELECT nvl(sum(sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan),0) FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1') as sum_principal_balance
,(SELECT nvl(sum(sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount),0) FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1') as sum_interest_amount
,sysdate
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , si_security_user , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid --sc_doc_regis WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) --and ( sc_doc_regis.regis_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and (sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '9 ') and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status='1') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
